reason: Verify the slice stays within RVV Stage 2 production-kernel measurement scope.
Check RVV plugin/provider facts remain authoritative and no q8/q4 or artifact-name authority is added.
Check Common EmitC/export remains neutral and only carries provider-built facts.
Check the active Gate slice advances the measured same-target path instead of evidence-only drift.

Check target/profile facts are validated but not used as route or dtype authority.
Check plugin/target locality for performance policy and dispatch measurement consumption.
Check no high-level compute or frontend path is introduced.
